# godaddy_domain (Data Source)

Read details for a single GoDaddy domain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain name to read.

### Optional

- `include_actions` (Boolean) Whether to include recent asynchronous domain actions from the v2 domain detail endpoint.
- `include_auth_code` (Boolean) Whether to request the sensitive domain auth code via the v2 domain detail endpoint.
- `include_dnssec_records` (Boolean) Whether to include DNSSEC records from the v2 domain detail endpoint.
- `include_registry_status_codes` (Boolean) Whether to include registry status codes from the v2 domain detail endpoint.

### Read-Only

- `actions` (List of Object) Recent domain actions when requested. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--actions))
- `auth_code` (String, Sensitive) Auth code returned by the v2 domain detail endpoint when requested.
- `contacts` (Attributes) Current domain contact set when returned by GoDaddy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--contacts))
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `dnssec_records` (List of Object) DNSSEC records when requested. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dnssec_records))
- `domain_id` (Number) GoDaddy domain identifier.
- `expiration_protected` (Boolean) Whether expiration protection is enabled.
- `expires_at` (String) Expiration timestamp.
- `expose_registrant_organization` (Boolean) WHOIS organization exposure flag.
- `expose_whois` (Boolean) WHOIS exposure flag.
- `hold_registrar` (Boolean) Whether registrar hold is enabled.
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the domain is locked.
- `name_servers` (List of String) Authoritative nameservers.
- `partial` (Boolean) Whether the v2 response was partial due to optional includes being unavailable.
- `privacy` (Boolean) Whether privacy is enabled.
- `registry_status_codes` (List of String) Registry status codes when requested.
- `renew_auto` (Boolean) Whether auto-renew is enabled.
- `renew_deadline` (String) Renewal deadline timestamp.
- `status` (String) Domain status.
- `transfer_protected` (Boolean) Whether transfer protection is enabled.

<a id="nestedatt--actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `actions`

Read-Only:

- `completed_at` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `modified_at` (String)
- `origination` (String)
- `reason` (Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--actions--reason))
- `request_id` (String)
- `started_at` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)

### Nested Schema for `actions.reason`

Read-Only:

- `code` (String)
- `fields` (List of String)
- `message` (String)

Read-Only:

- `registrant` (Attributes) Registrant contact. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--contacts--registrant))
- `tech` (Attributes) Tech contact. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--contacts--tech))

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) Email address.
